summary: Iteration 28: 4 Bug Fixes Verification - ALL 4 FEATURES WORKING. Feature 1: Share modal with colored icons (Facebook, X, WhatsApp, Email) and copy link button working. Feature 2: Commission field in provider catalog is readOnly/disabled. Feature 3: Non-organizer sees 'Accès réservé' NOT 'Devenir Organisateur'. Feature 4: Provider products show Lock icon + 'non modifiable' instead of Edit/Delete.
passed_tests: Feature 1: Share button opens modern modal with colored icons
Feature 1: Facebook button visible with blue #1877F2 background
Feature 1: X/Twitter button visible with black background
Feature 1: WhatsApp button visible with green #25D366 background
Feature 1: Email button visible with orange brand background
Feature 1: Copy link button visible and functional
Feature 1: All share data-testids present (share-btn, share-facebook, share-twitter, share-whatsapp, share-email, share-copy, share-close)
Feature 1: Copy button shows visual feedback after click
Feature 2: Commission field has readOnly attribute when adding provider product
Feature 2: Commission field has disabled attribute
Feature 2: Commission input has cursor-not-allowed class and gray bg-slate-100 background
Feature 3: No 'Devenir Organisateur' text present for non-organizer
Feature 3: 'Retour à mon espace' button displayed for redirect to /dashboard
Feature 4: Products with source='provider' show 'PRESTATAIRE' blue badge
Feature 4: Provider products show Lock icon with 'Produit prestataire — non modifiable' text
Feature 4: Manual products (without source='provider') show Edit/Modifier button
Feature 4: Manual products show Delete/Trash button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified 4 bug fixes: 1) Share modal on EventDetailPage.js (lines 1340-1420) displays colorful icons for Facebook, X, WhatsApp, Email and copy button. 2) Commission field in OrganizerDashboard.js (line 2191) is readOnly+disabled when organizer adds provider product. 3) Non-organizers accessing /organizer see 'Accès réservé' with redirect to /dashboard (lines 654-665). 4) Products with source='provider' show Lock icon + 'non modifiable' text instead of Edit/Delete (lines 2081-2091). All data-testids are properly implemented.

feature_3_no_devenir_organisateur.text_displayed: Accès réservé with redirect button to /dashboard

feature_4_provider_products_locked.ui_changes: Lock icon + 'Produit prestataire — non modifiable' text, PRESTATAIRE badge
